column4: Manually create users in the system. No automated migration needed.

column3: create maps from source to enums/dynamodb tablevalues
column4: Run pre-scripts to extract all unique source values from Auftrag.ini and Therapieplan.ini files for each mapping function. Source values may vary in casing/spelling (e.g. evaRood, EVAROOD, EVARED → EVA_ROOD). Build mapping tables for: mapElements, mapInsoleType, mapGroundSolePattern, mapProductionMethod, mapCoreMaterial, mapTopCoverMaterial, mapGroundSoleThickness, mapRotation (from InsolePlans), mapStringToEnum, mapTitleToGender (from Patients), mapDiagnose, mapFoottype (from Consults), mapShippingTarget (from Orders).

Manually add parentTenantObseleteID to TenantsData.txt for each tenant. The Podozorg expertise group may have a different parent than expected — verify and set the correct parent ID in the source file before generating tenants.csv.

Generate tenants.csv from TenantsData.txt using the field mapping on the Tenants sheet. This CSV will be used as input for the tenants import script and as a lookup source for subsequent migration steps.
Import tenants into the system using tenants.csv.
Generate patients.csv from Auftrag.ini files using the field mapping on the Patients sheet. Uses tenants.csv as a lookup for tenant_ref.
Import patients using patients.csv. Check by ID if the patient already exists: if yes, update only the changed fields; if no, create a new patient.

column3: Split scan images into left and right
column4: Each scan file contains both feet in one image. Run existing split script (with updated output filenames) to split into left and right: generates cad_template_url_left, cad_template_url_right, thumbnail_url_left, and thumbnail_url_right.
Run existing DICOM conversion script (with updated output filenames) to generate dicom_url_left and dicom_url_right from the split scan images.

Generate scans.csv from the processed scan files using the field mapping on the Scans sheet. Derive patient_id by extracting AT from the scan filename, looking up P_Nummer in Auftrag.ini, then constructing podozorg-{P_Nummer}. Uses tenants.csv for tenant_ref lookup.
Import scans into the system using scans.csv.
Generate consults.csv from Auftrag.ini files using the field mapping on the Consults sheet. Uses patients.csv for patient_id, tenants.csv for tenant_ref, and scans.csv for scan_2d_templates.
Import consults into the system using consults.csv.

Generate insole_plans.csv from Auftrag.ini and Therapieplan.ini files using the field mapping on the InsolePlans sheet. Uses consults.csv for consult_id, patients.csv for patient_id, and tenants.csv for tenant_ref and workshop lookups.
Import insole plans into the system using insole_plans.csv.

Generate orders.csv from Auftrag.ini files using the field mapping on the Orders sheet. Uses consults.csv for consult_id, insole_plans.csv for insole_plan_id, tenants.csv for tenant lookups, patients.csv for tenant_ref, and scans.csv for scan_2d_templates.
Import orders into the system using orders.csv.
